rulings.Case Title: ELENA JURADO et al VS. YISHUN LI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Thursday April 30, 2015. Line 4. PLAINTIFF ELENA JURADO, DONNA JURADO's Motion To Compel Further Responses TRANSFERRED to Department 301 to be heard on May 8, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 301 no later than April 30, 2015 by 4:00 p.m., with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN COCHRANE VS. VLADIMIR FEDEROV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of General And Special Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Partition Of Real Property, Intentional Infliction Of Emotional Distress, And Injury To Personal Property
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Thursday April 30, 2015. Line 6. DEFENDANT VLADIMIR FEDEROV and GALINA FEDEROVA's Special Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Partition Of Real Property, Intentional Infliction Of Emotional Distress, And Injury To Personal Property. CONTINUED to May 29, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than April 20, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/AJR)
